what_happened: Pinned GitHub Actions to full commit SHAs in build-container.yml
why: Tag-based action references (e.g. @v4) are mutable and can be silently updated, creating supply chain risk
fix_applied: Replaced all tag references with full 40-char commit SHAs plus version comment annotations (e.g. # v4.2.2)
pattern_to_remember: GitHub Actions in .github/workflows/ should always use full commit SHAs pinned with a version comment annotation (e.g. `uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2`). Never use mutable tags like @v4 or @main.
